invite.emailMismatch: This invite was sent to a different email. Please sign in with the invited email.
invite.alreadyAcceptedError: This invite has already been accepted.
invite.alreadyAccepted: This invite has already been accepted.
invite.loginRequired: Please log in or sign up to accept this invite.

subtitle.project: You are invited to this project
subtitle.workspaceClient: You are invited to this workspace as a client
subtitle.workspaceMember: You are invited to this workspace as a team member

message.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this? This action cannot be undone.

adminFeedback.title: User feedback
adminFeedback.responsePh: Write a reply to the user

qhelper.title: Q helper
qhelper.cueEmptyHint: Answers based on the current workspace's clients, tasks, schedule, and meetings. Other workspaces' data is not used.
qhelper.fbPitch: Help us make PlanQ better. We review every suggestion.
qhelper.fbBodyPh:
Be specific so we can act quickly.
Where / What / What you'd like
qhelper.emptyHint: Ask about PlanQ usage / features in natural language. Reads the current screen context.
qhelper.inputPh: Ask a question (Cmd/Ctrl + Enter to send)

cue.title: Cue Help
cue.emptyHint: Ask anything about PlanQ in natural language. Cue reads the current screen context.
cue.inputPh: Ask a question (Cmd/Ctrl + Enter to send)

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.defaultDesc: This feature is under development. Will be released soon.
comingSoon.qbillDesc: Quotes, invoices, payments, and tax invoices in one place. Under development.
comingSoon.statsDesc: Analytics module — design complete, implementation in progress.

forbidden.title: Access Denied
forbidden.desc: You do not have permission to access this page.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.dropHere: Drag files here or click [+ Add file]

editor.hintSuffix: to add a block · select text for formatting · paste/drag images

filepicker.title: Pick files
filepicker.dropHint: Drop files here or click to browse
filepicker.dropSub: Multiple files supported · up to 50 MB each
filepicker.existingEmpty: No files uploaded to this workspace yet

search.title: Global search
search.placeholder: Search tasks · docs · records · files · clients
search.hint: Type to search. Open with ⌘K or Ctrl+\.

attach.uploadHint: Drag files here or click to browse
attach.uploadAccept: Multiple files supported · saved to workspace

installPrompt.title: Use PlanQ like an app
installPrompt.androidDesc: Add PlanQ to your home screen for quick access.
installPrompt.iosStep: Tap the share button → "Add to Home Screen" to install the app icon.
installPrompt.menuStep: Open browser menu (︙) → "Add to Home Screen" to install the app icon.
installPrompt.shortDesc: Add to home screen to use PlanQ like a native app.
installPrompt.iosStep1: Tap the share button (□↑) in your browser
installPrompt.iosStep3: Tap the new PlanQ icon — it opens like an app
installPrompt.menuStep3: Tap the new PlanQ icon — it opens like an app

notifPrompt.title: Enable notifications
notifPrompt.desc: Get new messages, review requests, and payment alerts on your phone.

shareReceive.title: Share to PlanQ
shareReceive.hint: File and image sharing will arrive in a future update. For now, please attach directly inside PlanQ.

pwa.androidHint: Add to home screen for notifications and faster access
pwa.iosHint: Tap the Share button → "Add to Home Screen"

members.title: Member limit reached
members.desc: You've hit your plan's member cap. Add seats one at a time with the member add-on, or upgrade to a higher plan.

clients.title: Client limit reached
clients.desc: You've hit your plan's client cap. Add slots or upgrade.

projects.title: Project limit reached
projects.desc: Active projects are at the limit. Completed projects don't count — close them out, or upgrade your plan.

storage.title: Storage quota exceeded
storage.desc: Storage is full. Use the add-on or connect Google Drive for unlimited.
storage.addon: Storage add-on: ₩4,900/mo for 5GB · or connect Google Drive

fileSize.title: File too large
fileSize.desc: This file exceeds the single-file size limit on your plan.

cue.title: Cue AI monthly limit reached
cue.desc: You've used all Cue actions this month. Add capacity or it resets on the 1st.

qnote.title: Q Note monthly hours reached
qnote.desc: You've used all Q Note minutes this month.

feature.title: Not in your plan
feature.desc: This feature is available on higher plans.

inactive.title: Subscription inactive
inactive.desc: Pay your invoice to restore access. Check the billing page.

trial.title: {{days}} days left in your Starter trial
trial.desc: You can use every Starter feature during the trial.

trialEnding.title: {{days}} days left — pay to keep going
trialEnding.desc: Settle the bill before the trial ends to avoid auto-lock.

pastDue.title: Trial ended — {{days}} days left to pay
pastDue.desc: The workspace will be locked if payment is not received.

canceled.title: Workspace locked — pay to restore
canceled.desc: Access resumes immediately after payment is confirmed.
